dungeon: GENUINE ROTF marathon stream (~13 dungeon entries). The clearly-readable boss content is BASE-GAME RotMG (Haunted Cemetery / Lich's Lair): Oryx's Lich-announce line + the Lich + Haunted Spirit. These ALREADY EXIST in base content (the ROTF server runs base dungeons too) -> NOT new ROTF-custom content to build. Chat is visible but heavy with spam/player banter. Biomes: desert, grey/stone dungeons, a dark purple Lich arena, white/grey treasure vaults.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+transitions (multi-dungeon marathon): white/grey BRICK-TILED TREASURE VAULTS (rows of chests), tan DESERT + water, grey STONE rooms, and a DARK PURPLE BOSS ARENA (the Lich's Lair final room — open dark floor, purple/magenta bullets). Per-dungeon room sequence not traceable (stream).

uncertain: All readable bosses are base-game (Lich/Haunted Spirit/Oryx) — no ROTF-custom content here. Taunts are partial base lines. No dungeon names off loading screens. The purple arena assumed to be the Lich's Lair from the taunt context.
confidence: MEDIUM for identification (clearly base-game Haunted Cemetery/Lich content), but LOW BUILD VALUE — these bosses already exist in base data; nothing new to build. Map = base Lich's Lair + generic vault/desert biomes. Useful mainly to confirm base-dungeon coverage; not a source of new ROTF taunts/attacks.
